idea-plugin.name: Auto Localizer
idea-plugin.description:
Automatically translate XLIFF (.xlf/.xliff) and ARB (.arb) files. Uses existing translations to generate accurate and context-aware translations. High quality localization with one click!

Key features:

  • "Translate with Auto Localizer" action in the Project View and editor tab context menus for XLIFF and ARB files
  • Supports XLIFF 1.2, XLIFF 2.0, and Flutter-style ARB workflows
  • Configurable for different translation states (e.g., initial, new, ...)
  • Notifications for untranslated XLIFF segments and ARB translation on save
  • Powered by doloc.io, a translation service that uses AI to provide high-quality translations
  • Free and without registration for translation files with up to 100 texts

Getting started:

  1. Right-click on an XLIFF or ARB file in the Project View or an editor tab
  2. Select "Translate with Auto Localizer" from the context menu
  3. The plugin will automatically translate the selected file using the doloc service
  4. To configure, open File | Settings | Tools | Auto Localizer
Optionally:
  • Create a (free) account on doloc.io
  • Enter your API key in the settings (apply for a paid plan for larger text quota)
  • Configure XLIFF states and ARB untranslated rules
  • Enable/disable translation reminder notifications on save
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Improvements

  • Add ARB translation support with Flutter-aware base file heuristics, directory-scoped overrides, and ARB save reminders.
  • Update anonymous token if it was invalidated.

Bug Fixes

  • Show a clear dialog when manually translating malformed XLIFF files instead of surfacing a raw parse failure.
  • Show the translation action from Project View and file tabs context menu.

action.description: Translate XLIFF or ARB files with doloc service
